title: stelis scitula
intro: Stelis scitula, also known as the orchid stelis, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family and is native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis scitula include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potentially treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Stelis scitula is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
